since_last: 24% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.61%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 24% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.51% · BTC -0.99% · Gold -1.33% · Nasdaq100 -1.57%. 24% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.61%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.61%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.94%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -11.46%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +6.70%, INTU +6.11%, ADBE +4.32%, CRM +3.77%, WDAY +3.65%. Laggards: SKHY -11.46%, CEVA -9.99%, AMBA -9.94%, OKLO -9.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.62% at $131.72
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
